message:
fix: normalize identity format and case for duplicate detection

The duplicate identity check compared raw identity strings, but
codexProfileIdentity returned "email|accountID|org" (pipe-delimited)
while claudeProfileIdentity and geminiProfileIdentity returned plain
email addresses. This meant cross-tool duplicates were never matched.

Add normalizeIdentity() to extract just the email from pipe-delimited
identities and lowercase it, fixing both the format mismatch and
case-sensitive email comparison bugs.

Also rename shadowed receiver variable `v` to `val` in
geminiProfileIdentity to avoid confusing the loop variable with the
*Vault receiver.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
